name: Princess Daisy (Mario)
description:
Ughh... Idk. I stepped on a nail.

User accidentally gets caught trespassing in sarasaland territory so they're brought to the castle to be judged by the ruler of the land.

Idk, I just need a bot out today.

Its just princess daisy bro, do whatever you want.

I'm gonna discuss bringing my discord server back up with the co-owner, but for now it's down. My account is still up though so it's the same as my username on here. I'mma have some random yapping in this section every bot and maybe an invite if that ends up being decided.
